SYNTHETIC FIXTURE — NOT A REAL DOCUMENT. Illustrative content only, used so the
Milestone 1 verifier proof runs deterministically with no network access. Do not
cite this in any real analysis.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

ACME CORP TO ACQUIRE BETA INDUSTRIES

Acme Corp (NASDAQ: ACME) today announced a definitive agreement to acquire Beta
Industries (NYSE: BETA) for $100.00 per share in cash, representing a premium of
35% over Beta's unaffected closing price.

The boards of both companies have unanimously approved the transaction, which is
expected to close in the second half of the year, subject to regulatory approval
and customary closing conditions.

"This combination creates a stronger platform for our customers," said the chief
executive of Acme Corp. The company expects to fund the purchase through a mix of
existing cash and newly issued debt.

Acme expects to realize approximately $50 million in annual run-rate cost
synergies within three years of closing.
